overall.description: Game footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing a character traversing a water-filled cave onto a tropical beach with post-apocalyptic ruins, culminating in a dramatic reveal of a massive overgrown shipwreck and distant futuristic towers against a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: water-filled coastal cave with rocky walls and red overgrowth

events.description: character turns left and moves out of the camera frame
approaching cave exit, bright daylight becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water in a dark cave toward the bright exit, carrying a bow and shield

notable_agents.action: walking ahead through the water toward the cave exit

entered.detail: dark rocky cave ceiling with irregular texture
rough stone walls of the cave passage
vibrant red organic growth covering sections of the cave walls
shallow water covering the cave floor with reflective surface
bright daylight visible at the cave exit

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a dark, narrow cave with water covering the ground. The character wades forward through the shallow pool toward a bright exit, passing red coral-like growths on the stone walls. As the character approaches the light, they turn left and exit the frame, leaving the camera to continue toward the opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach at cave exit with palm trees and distant ruins

events.description: exits dark cave into bright open beach environment
full sunlight exposure creates sharp shadows on the sand

agents.ego_description: moving forward along the sandy shore, leaving the cave behind and approaching the open beach

entered.detail: golden sandy beach stretching along the shoreline
tall palm trees with green fronds scattered along the beach
ancient stone building with arched windows partially overgrown with vegetation
massive rusted metal structure of a shipwreck covered in red and green growth

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the cave into a bright tropical beach environment. The sandy shore stretches ahead with palm trees swaying in the distance. To the left, stone ruins with arched windows peek through vegetation, while to the right, the massive rusted hull of a shipwreck dominates the foreground. The lighting shifts dramatically from dim cave to bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with overgrown stone ruins and shipwreck debris

events.description: distant human figures become visible standing on the beach ahead
camera begins to tilt upward along the shipwreck structure

agents.ego_description: moving along the beach revealing more of the stone ruins and approaching distant figures near the water

notable_agents.action: group of figures standing near the water's edge in the distance

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water meeting the sandy shore
upper decks and rusted metal framework of the massive shipwreck

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the beach, moving past dense tropical vegetation and approaching a group of distant figures standing near the water. The stone ruins become more prominent on the left, while the massive shipwreck structure looms larger on the right. The camera begins to tilt upward, revealing the upper sections of the rusted vessel.

scene_state.functional_zone: massive overgrown shipwreck superstructure with panoramic ocean view

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the massive shipwreck superstructure
distant futuristic tower structures become clearly visible across the water

agents.ego_description: panning up the rusted shipwreck to reveal its immense scale and the distant towers on the horizon

entered.detail: lush green trees and vines growing on the rusted metal decks of the shipwreck
tall red and white futuristic tower structure rising from the distant shoreline
partly cloudy sky with scattered white clouds

segments.scene_description: The camera dramatically pans up the massive overgrown shipwreck, revealing its rusted superstructure covered in tropical vegetation. As the view ascends, distant futuristic towers become visible across the calm ocean waters. The scene emphasizes the scale of the post-apocalyptic environment, with the ruined vessel dominating the foreground and mysterious structures looming on the horizon under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a dark cave into a sprawling, sun-drenched tropical coastline. It begins by wading through shallow water inside a narrow cavern, passing red coral-like growths on the stone walls as it moves toward a bright exit. As the camera emerges from the cave, the lighting shifts dramatically from dimness to bright midday sun, revealing a sandy shore flanked by stone ruins and the massive rusted hull of a shipwreck. The view continues along the beach past dense vegetation and distant figures, with the ruined vessel looming larger on the right before the camera begins to tilt upward. Finally, the shot pans up the overgrown superstructure of the ship to reveal futuristic towers across the calm ocean under a partly cloudy sky.
